hierarchy.code: font-mono text-sm font-medium text-[#003F87] bg-blue-50 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-blue-100
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: The 'Control Room' grid: dense, structured, maximizing viewport space. Medical code tables and forms should align sharply.

components.button: rounded-md font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#0073CF] focus-visible:ring-offset-2
components.input: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#0073CF] focus-visible:border-transparent
components.badge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
components.sidebar_link: flex items-center gap-3 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors

auth_split_hero.description: ECG graph on a grid background symbolizing heartbeat and medical data, used for the left side of the split-panel registration/login page.

hospital_building.description: Clean modern blue hospital building. Can be used as alternative auth background.

company_logo.description: Abstract blue and white logo to be used as a placeholder for CHC Pro AI brand logo.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react react-hook-form @hookform/resolvers zod lucide-react`
Configure Tailwind CSS to use the specific color hex codes and IBM Plex Sans/Mono fonts.
Ensure the split-panel layout uses `auth_split_hero` or `hospital_building` on the left pane with an overlay (`bg-[#003F87]/80` or `bg-[#003F87]/60`) for brand messaging.

Implement the 8-step coding wizard using a sticky top progress bar. The 8 steps: 1. Upload, 2. OCR Scan, 3. PHI Purge, 4. AI Analysis, 5. ICD-10 Review, 6. CPT/HCPCS Review, 7. MS-DRG/Modifiers, 8. Final Export.
Medical codes (ICD-10, CPT, etc.) MUST use the `code` typography style (monospace font) for quick scanning.
The UI should feel extremely dense but readable (Control Room Grid). Avoid massive paddings on data tables. Use subtle 1px borders.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes.
Do not use generic 'Inter' or 'Roboto'. Inject the IBM Plex Sans font.
